notes: Local via Ollama. `ollama pull llama3.1:8b`. [independent_value: macro_off]

rawText: The pull request #41 in the repository acme/parser is titled "fix: null pointer dereference in parser" and has a body that describes guards against a null token. The author of the pull request is dev1, and it can be found at https://github.com/acme/parser/pull/41.
The pull request is titled "feat: add dark mode toggle" and adds a theme switch. It has not been labeled yet.
The pull request #44 in acme/core is titled "test: add coverage for the retry path" and was submitted by dev4.
The pull request is titled "chore: bump dependencies" and was submitted by dev5.
The pull request #46 in acme/uploader has been fetched. The title of the PR is "Fix crash when the upload buffer is empty" and it's a regression from issue #40.
The pull request is titled "Add support for cursor-based pagination" and has been authored by dev7. It does not have any labels yet.
The issue is titled "App crashes on startup after the latest update" and has a stack trace attached. It was reported by user reporter1.
The issue is titled "Add support for incoming webhooks" and has one comment.
The issue "Documentation for the auth flow is missing" has been triaged. It was reported by reporter3 and currently has no labels or comments.
The issue "Login button does nothing when clicked" has been triaged. It was reported by user reporter4 and currently has 2 comments.
The issue is titled "Please add an option to export reports to CSV" and has no labels.
The CODEOWNERS file indicates that Alice should review PR 61 in acme/api.
Based on the CODEOWNERS file, the suggested reviewer for PR 62 in acme/web is bob.

Based on the CODEOWNERS file, dana is a potential reviewer for PR 63 in acme/infra.

I will call gh_get_pull to get more information about the pull request.
